name: Elven Brigandine
description: Sipahi are the heavy cavalry that forms the core of the Ahjat Empire's army, a cornerstone of its many victories. Unsurprisingly, their gear is crafted only by the best armorsmiths on the personal orders of Ahjat emirs.
descriptionZh: 西帕希重骑兵是艾哈雅特帝国陆军的核心，为多次战役的胜利奠定了坚实的基础。他们的铠甲均由艾哈雅特手艺上乘的盔匠锻造，由埃米尔亲自督造，这也自然也在情理之中了。
